recommendations.title: Ring
recommendations.overview: A mysterious video has been linked to a number of deaths, and when an inquisitive journalist finds the tape and views it herself, she sets in motion a chain of events that puts her own life in danger.

recommendations.title: Dark Water
recommendations.overview: A woman in the midst of an unpleasant divorce moves to an eerie apartment building with her young daughter. The ceiling of their apartment has a dark and active leak.

recommendations.title: Sadako
recommendations.overview: A psychologist connects her missing brother to the strange case of a mysterious little girl believed to be Sadako reincarnated.

recommendations.title: Death Note: L Change the WorLd
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Action, Thriller, Science Fiction, Mystery

recommendations.title: The Ring Two
recommendations.overview: After the ordeal with Samara, Rachel and Aiden move to a rural town. But soon Rachel learns about the death of a girl in a similar fashion. To save Aiden, she must dig into Samara's past even further.

recommendations.title: Ring 2
recommendations.overview: While investigating the horrifying death of her boyfriend, Mai Takano learns about a videotape haunted by the spirit of a disturbing girl named Sadako, which kills anyone who watches it exactly one week later. When her boyfriend’s son, Yoichi, starts

recommendations.title: Sword Art Online the Movie - Progressive - Aria of a Starless Night
recommendations.overview: Asuna Yuuki had never played online games until accidentally putting on the NerveGear for Sword Art Online, the world’s first VRMMORPG. She soon finds herself and other players trapped inside a game, where if a player dies in the game, they die in th

recommendations.title: Big Time Adolescence
recommendations.overview: A seemingly bright and mostly innocent 16-year-old named Mo attempts to navigate high school under the guidance of his best friend Zeke, an unmotivated-yet-charismatic college dropout. Although Zeke genuinely cares about Mo, things start to go awry a

recommendations.title: Emily the Criminal
recommendations.overview: Desperate for income, Emily takes a shady gig buying goods with stolen credit cards supplied by a charismatic middleman named Youcef. Seduced by the quick cash and illicit thrills, they hatch a plan to take their business to the next level.

recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.
